prompt: A realistic 3D mockup of a softcover book standing upright at a slight angle on a plain off-white background, revealing both the front cover and the spine. The cover features a minimalist, serene illustration of a white arched doorway opening to a bright pastel sunrise over a calm sea, with a woman in a flowing white dress standing in the archway looking toward the horizon. Large, elegant vertical Japanese text in a Mincho serif font dominates the right and left sides of the arch, reading 我慢をやめたら、人生が動き出した。. In the top left corner, smaller horizontal text reads 自分の人生を取り戻す 7つのステップ. The bottom third of the book is wrapped in a light pink belly band. The band features a prominent horizontal catchphrase reading もう、他人軸で生きなくていい。, with smaller text above it separated by a dotted line mentioning work, relationships, love, and future anxiety. On the right side of the band is a white circular badge with a small crown icon and text reading 累計 20万部 突破!. At the very bottom of the band are exactly 4 small rectangular boxes containing keywords about self-esteem, time management, mental organization, and ideal future, followed by the text "Everything will change!". The spine is white and displays the main title, subtitle, a placeholder for the author's name, and a placeholder for the publisher.
